zh.lifeSummary: 當George Stratton Sr於1440年出生在英國素福爾可紹特利時，他的父親Edmund Stratton30歲，母親Margareth Mosell25歲。他於1476年與Elizabeth Fiske在英國素福爾可紹特利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年10月28日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可紹特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Stratton Sr于1440年出生在英国素福爾可紹特利时，他的父亲Edmund Stratton30岁，母亲Margareth Mosell25岁。他于1476年与Elizabeth Fiske在英国素福爾可紹特利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1498年10月28日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可紹特利。

nameMeanings.name: Stratton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Stratton or Stretton, almost all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, Roman road’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Stratton in Cornwall, which may also be a partial source of the surname, probably has as its first element Cornish stras ‘valley’.

English: variant of Sturton, a habitational name from Sturton le Steeple (Nottinghamshire), Great Sturton (Lincolnshire), Sturton by Stow (Lincolnshire), or possibly Sturton (Northumberland), all of which placenames share the same etymology and early spellings as 1 above.

Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘street, Roman road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Straiton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, street’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Stratton .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When George Stratton Sr was born in 1440, in Shotley, Suffolk, England, his father, Edmund Stratton, was 30 and his mother, Margareth Mosell, was 25. He married Elizabeth Fiske in 1476, in Shotley, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 28 October 1498, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Shotley, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Stratton Sr est né en 1440, à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Stratton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margareth Mosell, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Fiske en 1476, à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1498, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Stratton Sr 1440 in Shotley, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Stratton 30 und seine Mutter Margareth Mosell 25. Er hat 1476 in Shotley, Suffolk, England Elizabeth Fiske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Oktober 1498 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Shotley, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Stratton Sr è nato il nel 1440 nel Shotley, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Edmund Stratton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margareth Mosell, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Fiske nel 1476, nel Shotley, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 ottobre 1498, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Shotley, Suffolk, England.

ko.lifeSummary: George Stratton Sr(이)가 1440년 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Stratton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margareth Mosell(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1476년 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에서 Elizabeth Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 10월 28일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Stratton Sr nasceu em 1440, em Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Stratton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margareth Mosell, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Fiske em 1476, em Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1498, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Shotley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Stratton Sr родился в 1440 г. в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Stratton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margareth Mosell, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Fiske в 1476 г. в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 28 октября 1498 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия.
